trans-unit.source: The offer has been closed by the seller and is no longer accepting orders.
trans-unit.target: Offer telah ditutup oleh penjual dan tidak lagi menerima pesanan.

trans-unit.source: The items for the offer have arrived. This chat will close to new messages on .
trans-unit.target: Item untuk offer telah tiba. Chat ini akan ditutup untuk pesan baru pada .

trans-unit.source: The offer has been marked as completed.
The offer was updated by the seller.
Your order in the offer was removed because the seller reduced the available stock ().
trans-unit.target: Pesanan Anda di offer telah dihapus karena penjual mengurangi stok yang tersedia ().

trans-unit.source: The items for the offer you joined have arrived.
trans-unit.target: Item untuk offer yang Anda ikuti telah tiba.

trans-unit.source: Your offer reached its closing time fully sold out and has been closed automatically.
trans-unit.target: Offer Anda mencapai waktu tutupnya dengan terjual habis dan telah ditutup secara otomatis.

trans-unit.source: The offer you joined has been closed.
trans-unit.target: Offer yang Anda ikuti telah ditutup.

trans-unit.source: The offer is now complete. Please proceed with payment.
trans-unit.target: offer sekarang telah selesai. Silakan lanjutkan dengan pembayaran.

trans-unit.source: The offer you joined was deleted by the seller. Your order has been cancelled.
trans-unit.target: offer yang Anda ikuti telah dihapus oleh penjual. Pesanan Anda telah dibatalkan.

trans-unit.source: Your offer sold out early. It will be closed automatically when it reaches its closing time.
trans-unit.target: Offer Anda terjual habis lebih awal. Offer akan ditutup secara otomatis ketika mencapai waktu tutupnya.

trans-unit.source: cancelled their order in your offer.
trans-unit.target: membatalkan pesanan mereka di offer Anda.

trans-unit.source: placed an order in your offer.
updated their order in your offer.
trans-unit.target: memperbarui pesanan mereka di offer Anda.

trans-unit.source: Your payment for the offer has been confirmed by the seller.
trans-unit.target: Pembayaran Anda untuk offer telah dikonfirmasi oleh penjual.

trans-unit.source: uploaded a payment proof for your offer.
trans-unit.target: mengunggah bukti pembayaran untuk offer Anda.

trans-unit.source: The seller reduced available stock for '' in the offer, so your quantity was adjusted to .
trans-unit.target: Penjual mengurangi stok yang tersedia untuk '' dalam offer , sehingga kuantitas Anda disesuaikan menjadi .

trans-unit.source: The offer you joined was changed in ways that may affect your order. Please review.
trans-unit.target: offer yang Anda ikuti diubah dengan cara yang mungkin memengaruhi pesanan Anda. Silakan tinjau.

trans-unit.source: The offer you joined was updated by the seller.
trans-unit.target: offer yang Anda ikuti telah diperbarui oleh penjual.

trans-unit.source: Your offer's closing time was reached. It was not fully sold out, so it will remain open until you manually close it.
trans-unit.target: Waktu tutup offer Anda telah tercapai. Offer tidak sepenuhnya terjual habis, sehingga akan tetap buka sampai Anda menutupnya secara manual.
Offer Baru dari Request yang Disukai

trans-unit.source: An offer for '' () was created based on a request you liked.
trans-unit.target: Sebuah offer untuk '' () telah dibuat berdasarkan request yang Anda sukai.

trans-unit.source: Username can only contain lowercase letters, numbers, underscores, and periods
trans-unit.target: Username hanya boleh berisi huruf kecil, angka, garis bawah, dan titik

trans-unit.source: Are you sure you want to delete this item?
trans-unit.target: Apakah Anda yakin ingin menghapus item ini?

trans-unit.source: Please fill in the closing and arrival dates.
trans-unit.target: Harap isi tanggal penutupan dan kedatangan.

trans-unit.source: Items must arrive on or after the offer closing date.
trans-unit.target: Item harus tiba pada atau setelah tanggal penutupan offer.

trans-unit.source: On the same day, items must arrive at or after the offer closing time.
trans-unit.target: Pada hari yang sama, item harus tiba pada atau setelah waktu penutupan offer.

trans-unit.source: You already have an existing order in this offer.
trans-unit.target: Anda sudah memiliki pesanan di offer ini.

trans-unit.source: Cannot submit payment yet. The offer is still open.
trans-unit.target: Belum bisa mengirim pembayaran. Offer masih terbuka.

trans-unit.source:
Are you sure you want to cancel this order?
This action cannot be undone.
trans-unit.target:
Apakah Anda yakin ingin membatalkan pesanan ini?
Tindakan ini tidak dapat dibatalkan.

trans-unit.source: Failed to upload proof of payment:
Are you sure you want to remove this item from your cart?
trans-unit.target: Apakah Anda yakin ingin menghapus item ini dari keranjang Anda?
Tidak ada metode pembayaran yang diaktifkan.

trans-unit.source: Failed to mark items as arrived:

Are you sure you want to delete this offer?
This action cannot be undone.
trans-unit.target:
Apakah Anda yakin ingin menghapus offer ini?
Tindakan ini tidak dapat dibatalkan.

trans-unit.source: This information will be displayed publicly so be careful what you share.
trans-unit.target: Informasi ini akan ditampilkan secara publik jadi berhati-hatilah dengan apa yang Anda bagikan.

trans-unit.source: This information is only displayed to you.
trans-unit.target: Informasi ini hanya ditampilkan kepada Anda.

trans-unit.source: Are you sure you want to Sign out?

trans-unit.target: Tidak ada data rating yang tersedia

trans-unit.source: We may still send you important notifications about your account outside of your notification settings.
trans-unit.target: Kami mungkin masih mengirimi Anda notifikasi penting tentang akun Anda di luar pengaturan notifikasi Anda.

trans-unit.source: A buyer joins, places, updates, or cancels an order on one of your offers, or submits proof of payment.
trans-unit.target: Pembeli bergabung, membuat, memperbarui, atau membatalkan pesanan pada salah satu offer Anda, atau mengirimkan bukti pembayaran.

trans-unit.source: One of your offers closes automatically — either it reached its closing time or sold out.
trans-unit.target: Salah satu offer Anda ditutup secara otomatis — baik karena mencapai waktu penutupan atau habis terjual.

trans-unit.source: An offer you've joined is edited, closed, deleted, or completed, or your order on it is adjusted or removed.
trans-unit.target: Offer yang Anda ikuti diedit, ditutup, dihapus, atau diselesaikan, atau pesanan Anda di dalamnya disesuaikan atau dihapus.

trans-unit.source: Your payment is confirmed, or the items you ordered have arrived.
trans-unit.target: Pembayaran Anda telah dikonfirmasi, atau item yang Anda pesan telah tiba.

trans-unit.source: You receive a new direct or group chat message.
trans-unit.target: Anda menerima pesan chat langsung atau grup baru.

trans-unit.source: Arrival date cannot be in the past.
trans-unit.target: Tanggal kedatangan tidak boleh di masa lalu.

trans-unit.source: Arrival time cannot be in the past.
trans-unit.target: Waktu kedatangan tidak boleh di masa lalu.

trans-unit.source: Please set your location first before creating a request.
trans-unit.target: Harap atur lokasi Anda terlebih dahulu sebelum membuat request.
atau seret ke sini untuk mengunggah

trans-unit.source: Invalid file type. Please upload .jpg, .jpeg, or .png file.
trans-unit.target: Jenis file tidak valid. Harap unggah file .jpg, .jpeg, atau .png.

trans-unit.source: File size too large. Maximum size is MB.
trans-unit.target: Ukuran file terlalu besar. Ukuran maksimum adalah MB.

trans-unit.source: Search for a building or address
Account number must contain only numbers
trans-unit.target: Nomor rekening hanya boleh berisi angka

trans-unit.source:
Are you sure you want to delete this payment method?
This action cannot be undone.
trans-unit.target:
Apakah Anda yakin ingin menghapus metode pembayaran ini?
Tindakan ini tidak dapat dibatalkan.

trans-unit.source: Push notifications are blocked in your browser settings. Please enable them to receive notifications.
trans-unit.target: Notifikasi push diblokir di pengaturan browser Anda. Harap aktifkan untuk menerima notifikasi.

trans-unit.source: Another user creates an offer based on a request you liked.
trans-unit.target: Pengguna lain membuat offer berdasarkan request yang Anda sukai.

trans-unit.source: Someone you follow creates a new offer or request.
trans-unit.target: Seseorang yang Anda follow membuat penawaran atau permintaan baru.
